examples.title: Pseudocode: Machine Language
examples.code:
ALGORITHM AddTwoNumbers
INPUT: num1, num2
OUTPUT: sum

BEGIN
 sum = num1 + num2
 RETURN sum
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates how machine language might perform a simple addition operation.

examples.title: Python: Assembly Language Simulation
examples.code:
def add_two_numbers(num1, num2):
 # Simulating assembly language
 assembly_code = f"ADD {num1}, {num2}"
 print(f"Assembly Code: {assembly_code}")
 return num1 + num2

result = add_two_numbers(5, 10)
print(f"Result: {result}")
examples.explanation: This Python code simulates how assembly language might perform a simple addition operation.
